device_note: Reported on Apple Silicon MPS, float32, open_clip ViT-B-32 laion2b_s34b_b79k.

text_only_clip.note: CLIP text embedding of description vs class prompts.

vision_only_clip.note: CLIP image embedding vs visual class prompts. -26.6 pp vs text.

multimodal_vqa_blip2.note: blip2-opt-2.7b. Degenerate: predicts sandstone for all intervals.

multimodal_fusion_clip.note: CLIP 0.6/0.4 text-vision fusion. Ties text-only; does not exceed it.

provenance: Real runs from GeoMM_Bench_Complete_Evaluation.ipynb (open_clip ViT-B-32 laion2b_s34b_b79k). Text-only and CLIP fusion 0.886/0.909; vision-only 0.620/0.636; Grounding DINO 0.071/0.091; BLIP-2 0.143/0.273. Text-only is independently reproducible via scripts/run_evaluation.py; vision/grounding/BLIP-2/fusion additionally require the operator source PDF (see DATASHEET.md).
